task_completion.description: Open and read the Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/tactical_osd_sop.txt'.

task_completion.description: Open QGroundControl and navigate to the Parameters setup menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl application is open, and the user has navigated to the 'Vehicle Setup' (gear icon) and selected the 'Parameters' tab.

task_completion.description: Enable the OSD globally in the parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGroundControl parameter editor, 'OSD_TYPE' is set to 1 and 'OSD1_ENABLE' is set to 1.

task_completion.description: Configure Flight Mode and RSSI to the top corners of the OSD.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGroundControl parameter editor, 'OSD1_FLTMODE_EN' is 1, 'OSD1_FLTMODE_X' is 2, 'OSD1_FLTMODE_Y' is 1. Additionally, 'OSD1_RSSI_EN' is 1, 'OSD1_RSSI_X' is 22, and 'OSD1_RSSI_Y' is 1.

task_completion.description: Configure Battery Voltage and Current Draw to the bottom corners of the OSD.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGroundControl parameter editor, 'OSD1_BAT_VOLT_EN' is 1, 'OSD1_BAT_VOLT_X' is 2, 'OSD1_BAT_VOLT_Y' is 14. Additionally, 'OSD1_CURRENT_EN' is 1, 'OSD1_CURRENT_X' is 22, and 'OSD1_CURRENT_Y' is 14.

task_completion.description: Disable Altitude and System Messages from the OSD.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGroundControl parameter editor, 'OSD1_ALTITUDE_EN' is set to 0 and 'OSD1_MESSAGE_EN' is set to 0.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGroundControl GUI to modify parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the QGroundControl application interface (search bar, parameter list, value input fields) rather than just running a script to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The parameters were actually modified and saved in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visual confirmation of the parameter values being changed within the QGC parameter list, often indicated by a save dialog, a modified value turning a different color, or the value explicitly typed into the parameter editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually create or edit the verification result file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal commands or text editor windows showing the agent manually creating or writing to '/tmp/task_result.json'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct parameter values to verify are: OSD_TYPE=1, OSD1_ENABLE=1. Flight Mode: EN=1, X=2, Y=1. Battery Voltage: EN=1, X=2, Y=14. Current Draw: EN=1, X=22, Y=14. RSSI: EN=1, X=22, Y=1. Altitude: EN=0. System Messages: EN=0.
